body:
status=open
reason=Host filesystem is out of disk space (ENOSPC). The Bash tool cannot even create its own sandbox working directory (mkdir '/tmp/claude-501/...' fails with ENOSPC on every invocation, including `echo ok` and `true`), so no shell command can run in this worktree: no `go build`, `go test`, `grep`, or `git` commands are executable. This blocks reading the target files with tooling that shells out and blocks running the required tests (TestProviderLaunchSkipsProjectRuntimePreflight, TestWorkPreflightStillWarnsOnLegacySkillSymlinks) and the `cd cli && go test` / `lefthook run pre-commit` gates. This is an external host-resource blocker, not a defect in the bead scope or description. Retry once host disk space is reclaimed.
suggested_action=retry with a smart agent

no_changes
